name: Cable Standing Fly
shortDescription: A cable isolation exercise for the chest, performed standing and moving arms in a hugging motion.
instructions: Stand between two cable stacks, grab the D-handles, and take a step forward. With a slight bend in elbows, bring the handles together in front of the chest, then slowly return to the starting position.
steps: Attach handles to both high pulleys.
Stand centered between pulleys, grasp handles in each hand.
Step forward into a staggered stance, arms outstretched.
With elbows slightly bent, bring handles together in front of chest.
Return slowly to starting position, feeling the stretch in the chest.
breathing: Exhale as you bring hands together, inhale as you return.
